overview: Dr. Arman Kabir's Care is a comprehensive bilingual (English/Bangla) patient management and doctor portal for clinics. It features hybrid cloud+offline storage, a central clinical data engine, smart clinical intelligence alerts (sepsis, AKI, drug safety), an actionable doctor decision dashboard, ward round mode, full audit trail, multi-device sync, AI-powered summaries, bed management, and a complete patient portal — all backed by an Internet Computer canister with offline-first PWA support.
features: Hybrid cloud + offline-first storage with auto-migration from localStorage
Central clinical data engine (Patient, Encounter, Observation, Orders, Results, Notes)
Smart clinical intelligence: sepsis alert, AKI alert, hypotension/hypoxia detection
Doctor decision dashboard with red/yellow/green actionable panels
Ward round mode with swipe navigation and quick-action buttons
Full audit trail: before/after values, who/when, visible to Admin + Consultant Doctor
Fine-grained role permissions (Consultant, MO, Intern, Nurse, Staff)
Patient portal with restricted own-profile view, complaints log, drug reminders
Bilingual English/Bangla UI with auto-translate for patient-facing content
Prescription & EMR with clinical summary auto-populated from visit
Drug safety: interactions, allergy alerts, renal dose adjustment, duplicate therapy detection
AI assistant for patient summaries and diagnosis suggestions
Bed management with occupancy view and transfer tracking
Data backup and export as PDF/CSV
Performance optimization with lazy loading and IndexedDB caching
